_comment: synthetic-dev: ONE-NODE rtsm fleet. rtsm-client always discovers via GET /fleet/discover — served only in fleet mode — so the local node runs as a single-node FLEET (itself the only member; no peers to mesh with) rather than bare single-instance mode. up.sh launches rtsm-api with FLEET_CONFIG_PATH=<this file> + FLEET_NODE_NAME=local. The endpoint is what the BROWSER is told to connect to, so it must be the host-visible URL.
